title: Export File Text
description:
The Export File TXT connector is an internal export connector that generates plain text files containing entity names or observable values, one per line.

This format is ideal for:

- Creating blocklists for firewalls and security tools
- Feeding IOC values to SIEM systems
- Generating simple reports of entity names
- Integration with tools that accept newline-separated input

The connector supports list exports (selection or query-based) but does not support single entity exports.
short_description: The Export File TXT connector generates plain text files with entity names or observable values, one per line, ideal for blocklists, SIEM IOC feeds, and tools that accept newline-separated input.
